description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- refactor(i18n): enabled languages by @zevnda in #1532
Full Changelog: 4.0.7...4.0.8
